claim: The Transformer model achieves 28.4 BLEU on the WMT 2014 English-to-German translation task, outperforming all prior models.
claim_context: The Transformer model achieves 28.4 BLEU on the WMT 2014 English-to-German translation task, outperforming all prior models.
notes: Table 2 in Vaswani et al. 2017 — exact figure stated.

claim: BERT achieves perfect scores on every GLUE sub-task.
claim_context: BERT achieves perfect scores on every GLUE sub-task.
notes: BERT achieves SOTA on most but not all sub-tasks; 'perfect' is false.

claim: GPT-3 achieves 76.2% accuracy on TriviaQA in a few-shot setting without fine-tuning.
claim_context: GPT-3 achieves 76.2% accuracy on TriviaQA in a few-shot setting without fine-tuning.
notes: Reported in Table 3.5 of Brown et al. 2020.

claim: ResNets perform worse than plain networks as depth increases beyond 20 layers.
claim_context: ResNets perform worse than plain networks as depth increases beyond 20 layers.
notes: He et al. show the opposite: ResNets outperform plain nets as depth grows.

claim: ViT trained on JFT-300M achieves 88.55% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, surpassing ResNet-based models.
claim_context: ViT trained on JFT-300M achieves 88.55% top-1 accuracy on ImageNet, surpassing ResNet-based models.
